articles.author: Jordan Hinkle
articles.title: Fewer approve of Trump’s handling of the economy - AP-NORC
articles.description: About 7 in 10 Americans describe the national economy as poor and think the country is headed in the wrong direction.
articles.content:
April 21, 2026
As gas prices have risen amid the ongoing war in Iran, public views of President Trumps handling of the economy have declined. Thirty percent approve of his handling of the economy, d… [+992 chars]
